final:
module top_module(
    input [7:0] in0,
    input [7:0] in1,
    input [7:0] in2,
    input [7:0] in3,
    input [1:0] sel,
    output [7:0] out
);

    // Assign the output based on the select signal
    assign out = (sel == 2'b00) ? in0 :
                 (sel == 2'b01) ? in1 :
                 (sel == 2'b10) ? in2 : in3;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out <= in0; out <= in1; out <= in2; out <= in3;
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: out <= in0; out <= in1; out <= in2; out <= in3;
